ingredients_text: Salted coated pea 32% (green peas 60%, corn starch, _wheat_ flour, sunflower oil, sugar, sea salt), honey roasted corn 27% (corn 67%, sunflower oil, sugar, honey 4%), corn chips 25% (corn 72%, sunflower oil), honey roasted broad beans 16% (broad beans 64%, sunflower oil, sugar, honey 4%)
